notes.title: Movement regression hotfix
notes.summary: Fixed the 1.0.1 production regression that repeatedly reset active lateral input during play, restored normal ship movement in live production, and added a stronger hotfix smoke suite plus hosted-lane input probes so obvious control failures are caught before promotion.

notes.title: Input and feedback hotfix
notes.summary: Replaced the fragile modifier-key left-handed control path with always-active A/Z left and D/C right movement, added focus-loss input reset so ships cannot latch sideways, switched in-game feedback delivery from FormSubmit to Web3Forms, and slowed the success confirmation long enough to read before the panel closes.

notes.title: Post-launch score-submit and refresh-reminder hotfix
notes.summary: Fixed a production issue where signed-in runs could save locally without inserting into the shared leaderboard, moved remote score submission into the main game-over path with diagnostics-backed failure reporting, and added a hosted refresh reminder with a one-click action so players on stale tabs can pick up live fixes cleanly.

notes.title: Aurora Galactica 1.0 launch
notes.summary: Launched the polished four-stage arcade slice with capture and rescue play, dual-fighter runs, a signed-in pilot profile, an in-game replay viewer, in-frame help and score surfaces, reviewed beta-to-production promotion, and a fresh production leaderboard baseline for official post-launch scoring.

notes.title: Pilot profile card, in-frame overlays, and rescue-flow polish
notes.summary: Added a fuller in-game pilot profile card with sign-in, reset-password, and flight-history surfaces, constrained the main popup windows to the gameplay frame with consistent dismiss controls, preserved released captured fighters through stage clear so dual-fighter joins are not skipped, and kept the native replay viewer, player guide, and launch-shell polish aligned for beta checkpoint testing.

notes.title: Aurora production lane and public beta split
notes.summary: Established Aurora Galactica as the official production URL, published a distinct production-beta lane, preserved legacy Codex bookmarks with redirects, and clarified release labeling so public players no longer see alpha branding on the live build.

notes.title: Capture clarity, boss feedback, and 1.0 release focus
notes.summary: Improved rescue-versus-destroy feedback, strengthened ship-hit and boss first-hit cues, aligned the carried-fighter attack position with the original game, and promoted visible special squadron bonuses into the four-stage 1.0 release plan.

notes.title: Build identity, settings drawer, and roadmap sync
notes.summary: Replaced the floating tools stack with a settings drawer, added stamped build identity, and aligned the project with an explicit release policy and roadmap.

notes.title: Results screen and challenge bonus pass
notes.summary: Added the Galaga-style results screen before initials entry and introduced manual-backed challenge-stage group bonus behavior.
